title: IF-0-DISSECT-1 tool-usage profile — v1 FROZEN
description: Frozen after the first real jsonl inspection (claude-code + codex). METADATA ONLY: tool names, argument KEYS, argument SHAPE/type, counts, frequencies, and a per-harness feasibility verdict record. NEVER raw argument values, file contents, or prompt/message bodies. The companion validator (validate_profile.py) enforces this schema AND runs an independent semantic redaction pass that rejects any leaf value that is not a shape/type token. v0->v1 delta recorded in report.md.

arg_shape_sample.description: Recursive SHAPE map. Every scalar leaf MUST be a type token in {string,integer,number,boolean,null}; objects nest; arrays hold one element shape. Recursive type-vocabulary enforcement lives in validate_profile.py's redaction pass (kept out of JSON Schema so the mini stdlib interpreter stays small AND so redaction is provably independent of schema shape).
